items.title: Back to back off the dribble airball 3s landing extreeeeemely wide right by Knicks prospects Mo Diawara and Pacome Dadiet. Difficult to assess which one missed by more without a telescope, but let's just say neither attempt was anywhere close.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Back to back off the dribble airball 3s landing extreeeeemely wide right by Knicks prospects Mo Diawara and Pacome Dadiet. Difficult to assess which one missed by more without a telescope, but let's just say neither attempt was anywhere close.

items.title: Knicks confirm that Mo Diawara, Pacome Dadiet and Dillion Jones, along with second-round pick Tyler Nickel, will play for the Knicks summer league squad in Las Vegas this month.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks confirm that Mo Diawara, Pacome Dadiet and Dillion Jones, along with second-round pick Tyler Nickel, will play for the Knicks summer league squad in Las Vegas this month.

Unfortunately, Jack Kayil is not on the roster. Further indication he will be stashed overseason next season.

items.title: "mikal bridges wore a pacome dadiet jersey to the knicks' championship parade" is a sentence steeped in so many layers of "wait is this real life?" my brain can't handle thinking about it for too long
